Notes: UWO's best start since a 15-0 beginning to the 2004-05 season...Second contest
between teams, with UWO winning a 90-40 game on 11/26/93...UWO's Kitzke ties a
career best with 25 points...UWO built a 24-13 lead and led 52-37 with 12:58
to play...AC went on 17-3 scoring run to cut deficit to 55-54 with 3:38 left.
Game.Officials: Michele Duncan,  Michael Paynes,  Ann Esplin
